site.title: BitAiir
site.description: A decentralized payment cryptocurrency — fast, zero-fee, and mineable by anyone.

footer.tagline: A decentralized payment cryptocurrency — fast, zero-fee, and mineable by anyone.
footer.legal: The BitAiir Developers. Released under the MIT license.

hero.title: Decentralized money that moves in seconds.
hero.subtitle: BitAiir is an open, decentralized payment cryptocurrency. Zero fees, 5-second confirmations, and a proof-of-work designed to keep mining accessible on any ordinary computer.

features.title: Built for spending, not speculation.
features.subtitle: Four decisions shape the way BitAiir feels every day.

fast.title: Confirmations in seconds
fast.body: A 5-second block time means payments settle while you're still looking at the screen. Wallets can treat one confirmation as final for everyday amounts.

zero_fees.title: Zero transaction fees
zero_fees.body: No mandatory fee. Anti-spam comes from a tiny proof of work on each transaction — about two seconds of CPU from the sender — so honest users are never priced out.

cpu_mineable.title: Mineable on any computer
cpu_mineable.body: Proof of Aiir wraps SHA-256d in Argon2id (64 MiB memory-hard). The memory cost kneecaps ASICs and GPUs, keeping regular CPUs competitive.

decentralized.title: No pre-mine, no foundation cut
decentralized.body: Every coin enters circulation through a mined block. Issuance halves over time but never stops — a permanent 10 AIIR tail keeps miners paid forever.

how.title: A familiar model, tuned for payments.
how.subtitle: BitAiir keeps what works in Bitcoin and changes only what gets in the way of everyday use.

utxo.title: UTXO accounting
utxo.body: Balances are derived from unspent outputs, not a global ledger. No smart-contract surface, no shared mutable state — just signed transfers.

poa.title: Proof of Aiir
poa.body: Blocks are secured by a double-SHA-256 hash wrapped in a 64 MiB memory-hard Argon2id step. The result is a mining race where commodity silicon wins.

p2p.title: Peer-to-peer by default
p2p.body: Nodes gossip transactions and blocks directly. There are no trusted indexers, no sequencers, and no custodial bridges in the protocol.

terminal.title: A full node in a single terminal.
terminal.body: Launch the daemon in interactive mode and mine, send, and inspect the chain from a single TUI — no extra tooling required.
terminal.caption: BitAiir Core — interactive mode

cta.title: Ready to try it?
cta.body: BitAiir is open source and pre-mainnet. Grab the latest build, or read the protocol to see how each decision is justified.
